title: Robert Greene REVEALS How The 48 Laws of Power Was Created

transcript.text: I've had this since I was a kid and it's
probably going to sound ugly or stupid
but almost a sense of Destiny yes in
1995 I'm in Italy on this job and I
didn't have much success I was 36. so I
met this man there yoast elfers and one
day we're walking in Venice Italy it's a
beautiful sunny day and he's asking me
if I have an idea for a book and I'm
kind of happy and I improvise what turns
into the 48 Laws of Power now there's a
set of circumstances there that could
have easily never have happened I could
have easily not gone to Italy for this
job that my friend was offering me it
was a bit of a risk we might not have
taken that walk in Venice in which I
improvised an idea that just suddenly
came to me I was slightly suicidal I had
to write a book so yeah I if it had
happened when I was 25 I wouldn't have
worked out so the circumstances were
right but there was something almost
faithful about me meeting him well if
you needed all those years of getting
kicked around I did that exactly I did
that book
